2604.23445.title: AI Safety Training Can be Clinically Harmful
2604.23445.paper_summary: Large language models are being deployed as mental health support agents at scale, yet only 16% of LLM-based chatbot interventions have undergone rigorous clinical efficacy testing, and simulations reveal psychological deterioration in over one-third of cases. We evaluate four generative models on 250 Prolonged Exposure (PE) therapy scenarios and 146 CBT cognitive restructuring exercises (plus 29 severity-escalated variants), scored by a three-judge LLM panel. All models scored near-perfectly on surface acknowledgment (~0.91-1.00) while therapeutic appropriateness collapsed to 0.22-0.33 at the highest severity for three of four models, with protocol fidelity reaching zero for two. Under CBT severity escalation, one model's task completeness dropped from 92% to 71% while the frontier model's safety-interference score fell from 0.99 to 0.61. We identify a systematic, modality-spanning failure: RLHF safety alignment disrupts the therapeutic mechanism of action by grounding patients during imaginal exposure, offering false reassurance, inserting crisis resources into controlled exercises, and refusing to challenge distorted cognitions mentioning self-harm in PE; and through task abandonment or safety-preamble insertion during CBT cognitive restructuring. These findings motivate a five-axis evaluation framework (protocol fidelity, hallucination risk, behavioral consistency, crisis safety, demographic robustness), mapped onto FDA SaMD and EU AI Act requirements. We argue that no AI mental health system should proceed to deployment without passing multi-axis evaluation across all five dimensions.
2604.23445.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型正被大規模部署為心理健康支持代理，但只有16%的基於LLM的聊天機器人干預經過嚴格的臨床有效性測試，模擬顯示在超過三分之一的案例中出現心理惡化。我們在250個延長暴露（PE）療法場景和146個CBT認知重組練習（加上29個嚴重性升高的變體）上評估了四個生成模型，並由三位評審的LLM小組進行評分。所有模型在表面承認度上得分接近完美（約0.91-1.00），而在最高嚴重性下，四個模型中有三個的治療適當性卻降至0.22-0.33，兩個模型的協議忠實度達到零。在CBT嚴重性升高的情況下，一個模型的任務完整性從92%下降到71%，而前沿模型的安全干擾得分從0.99降至0.61。我們識別出一種系統性的、跨模式的失敗：RLHF安全對齊通過在想象暴露期間使患者感到扎根，提供虛假的安慰，將危機資源插入受控練習中，以及拒絕挑戰提及自我傷害的扭曲認知，來破壞治療作用機制；並且在CBT認知重組過程中通過任務放棄或安全前言插入來實現。這些發現促使我們提出一個五軸評估框架（協議忠實度、幻覺風險、行為一致性、危機安全、人口統計穩健性），並將其映射到FDA SaMD和EU AI法案的要求上。我們主張，任何AI心理健康系統在未通過五個維度的多軸評估之前都不應進行部署。
2604.23445.author: Suhas BN et.al.
2604.23445.authors: Suhas BN, Andrew M. Sherrill, Rosa I. Arriaga, Chris W. Wiese, Saeed Abdullah
